name: Deep pipeline seam over shallow helper module
description: Prefer a deep LinterPipeline seam with swappable adapters instead of many exported helpers

name: Adapter identity by key not display name
description: Use a deterministic key for adapter identity and file routing, separate from display name

name: Run cross-cutting adapters independently
description: Run cross-cutting adapters once on all files, separate from extension-based routing

name: Multi-root CLI adapter fan-out and merge
description: Group project-root/workspace CLI runs by discovered root and merge results

content: Repo-specific linter configuration must be passed through the pipeline to backend adapters instead of constructing adapters with hard-coded defaults. For markdownlint, the configured ApiLinterRunner from loadLinterConfig should be passed into createMarkdownlintAdapter so that local .markdownlint.jsonc or package.json settings are honored. Adapters should receive configuration objects rather than reading configuration themselves.
